UI_BAM_button.title: Train Mechanics
UI_BAM_button_desc.success_chance: Parts with success chance <%1% will be skipped
UI_BAM_button_desc.recipes_required: Required recipes to work on all parts
UI_BAM_button_desc.empty_seats: To work on seats make sure they are empty.
UI_BAM_message.car_completed: Whew! This car is done for today!
UI_BAM_message.car_completed_pickup_item: Gonna pick up my dropped items.
UI_BAM_options_desc.min_success_chance_1: This value is about the chance to install/uninstall any given vehicle part. Parts with a success chance below this value will be skipped during training.
UI_BAM_options_desc.min_success_chance_2: All parts will be worked on. Parts will break at lower skill levels.
UI_BAM_options_desc.min_success_chance_3: Default setting for a good balance.
UI_BAM_options_desc.min_success_chance_4: Only parts that are guaranteed to succeed will be worked on. Completely safe at all skill levels.
UI_BAM_options_desc.play_failure_sound: Plays an audio cue when you fail to install or remove a vehicle part. This fixes a base-game bug where the sound does not play in singleplayer mode.
